since_last: 53% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.09%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +1.09% · Gold +0.36% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 53% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.09%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.09%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +16.74%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +16.74%, QCOM +12.42%, AMAT +6.50%, LRCX +6.43%, ARM +5.82%. Laggards: BABA -2.82%, EQIX -2.63%, BIDU -1.42%, NOW -1.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.48% at $156.83
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.48% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
